configurations.name: web
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && pnpm --filter web dev

configurations.name: web-widget
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && pnpm --filter web dev -p 3200

configurations.name: demo-bellevue
runtimeArgs: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && pnpm --filter demo-bellevue dev
